channel.title: sindresorhus/awesome-npm Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: sindresorhus/awesome-npm Jan 29th - Feb 4th, 2018
item.description:
Packages

Other

  • cli-error-notifierstars62 - Sends native desktop notifications when npm scripts fail.
  • onchangestars723 - Watch files and folders and run a command when something changed.
  • npm-run-allstars4.1k - CLI tool to run multiple npm-scripts in parallel or serial.

item.title: sindresorhus/awesome-npm Jun 13th - Jun 19th, 2016
item.description:
Tools

Web

  • npms - Superb package search with deep analysis of package quality using a myriad of metrics.
    • npm-introspect - A npms-based utility for visually exploring the quality of package dependencies.

Other

  • npm-upgradestars257 - Update outdated npm dependencies interactively.

Packages

Other

  • johnstars43 - Make npm3's flat dependencies easier to find and sort.

item.title: sindresorhus/awesome-npm Jan 18th - Jan 24th, 2016
item.description:
Articles

  • Optimizing the footprint of an npm package
  • The Art of Nodestars9.1k - An introduction to Node.js and client-side development with npm.
  • Unix philosophy and Node.js - Write programs that do one thing and do it well.

    • Packages

    Registry

  • latest-versionstars39 - Get the latest version of an npm package.
  • npm-userstars48 - Get user info of an npm user.
  • npm-emailstars15 - Get the email of an npm user.
  • npm-user-packagesstars1 - Get packages by an npm user.
  • npm-statsstars51 - Get data from an npm registry.

    • Packages

    Other

  • generator-nmstars710 - Scaffold out an npm package.
  • npm-issuesstars49 - Search known issues of all your packages at once.
  • enpeem-searchstars4 - Search packages by scraping the npm web search.

item.title: sindresorhus/awesome-npm Jan 11th - Jan 17th, 2016
item.description:
Packages

Other

  • npm-checkstars5.8k - Check for outdated, incorrect, and unused dependencies, as well as interactive update.
  • engine-depsstars20 - Manage Node.js version specific dependencies with ease.
  • npestars69 - CLI for inspecting and editing properties in package.json.
  • local-npmstars1.1k - Use npm offline.
  • npm-homestars173 - Open the npm page of a package.
  • gh-homestars166 - Open the GitHub page of a package.
  • davidstars943 - Check if your package dependencies are out of date.
  • npm-shrinkwrapstars786 - A consistent shrinkwrap tool.
  • npm-windows-upgradestars2.3k - Upgrade npm on Windows.
  • pkg-upstars114 - Find the closest package.json file.
  • read-pkg-upstars188 - Read the closest package.json file.
  • normalize-package-datastars149 - Normalize package metadata.
  • pkg-confstars101 - Get namespaced config from the closest package.json.
  • npm-run-pathstars85 - Run locally installed binaries in the terminal by name like with global ones.

    • Packages

    Publishing

  • semantic-releasestars12.6k - Fully automated package publishing.
  • publish-pleasestars752 - Publish packages safely and gracefully.
  • npstars6.1k - A better npm publish.
  • npm-releasestars101 - Making releasing to npm so easy a kitten could probably do it™.
  • pkgfilesstars80 - List all files which would be published in a package.

    • Articles

  • Small focused modules
  • Semver: A Primer (Must read!)
  • Semver: Tilde and Caret
  • Offline installation of npm packages

    • Tools

    Web

  • npmsearch - Fast package search with ranking based on metrics like stars, dependents, release frequency, etc.
  • node-modules - Personalized package search based on your GitHub social graph.
  • NodeICO - Package badges.
  • Libraries.io - Package discovery.
  • npm-stat - Statistics charts for packages.
  • npmgraph - Visualization of dependencies.
  • npm trends - Compare package download counts over time.
  • npm-compare - Easily search and compare packages.
  • npm-top - npm users by downloads.
  • npm semver calculator - Visually explore what versions of a package a semver range matches.

    • Tools

    Browser extensions

  • Octo-Linker - Chrome extension to navigate across npm packages on GitHub with ease.
  • npm-hub - Chrome extension to explore npm dependencies on GitHub repos.

    • Packages

    Registry

  • npm-namestars242 - Check whether a package name is available on npm.
  • package-jsonstars164 - Get the package.json of a package from the npm registry.
  • npm-keywordstars38 - Get a list of npm packages with a certain keyword.
  • dpnstars25 - Get the dependents of a user's npm packages.

    • Tips

    Command aliases

  • npm i → npm install
  • npm t → npm test
  • npm it → npm install && npm test
  • npm r → npm uninstall

    • FAQ

  • Check in node_modules vs. shrinkwrap
  • What is the difference between Bower and npm?
  • What does ^ mean in package.json versioning?
  • Find the version of an installed npm package
  • What's the difference between dependencies, devDependencies, and peerDependencies in package.json?

    • Community

  • #npm on Freenode
  • Reddit
  • Twitter

    • Documentation

  • Official
  • Troubleshooting
  • Semantic versioning
  • Fixing npm permissions
  • package.json
  • npm run script
  • Stats APIstars318

    • Support

  • Twitter
  • Contact form
